result.stdout:
Usage: Validate [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  validate      Searches the specified directory and upgrades various files to
                the requested version of .Net

Run 'Validate [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

Usage: Validate [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  validate      Searches the specified directory and upgrades various files to
                the requested version of .Net

Run 'Validate [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Searches the specified directory and upgrades various files to the requested version of .Net

Usage: Validate validate [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                                      Show help information.
  -hjp|--PathToHealthJson <PATH_TO_HEALTH_JSON>     PathToHealthJson
                                                    Default value is:
                                                    /dependencies/latestHealthEndpointPayload.json.
  -olp|--PathToOpsLevelYml <PATH_TO_OPS_LEVEL_YML>  PathToOpsLevelYml
                                                    Default value is:
                                                    opslevel.yml.
  -p|--product <PRODUCT>                            The Product designation you
                                                    expect to be in
                                                    opsLevel.yaml for the
                                                    Product field. Defaults to
                                                    'micro-machines'
                                                    Default value is: product.
  -o|--owner <OWNER>                                The name of the Team you
                                                    expect to be in
                                                    opsLevel.yaml for the Owner
                                                    field. Defaults to
                                                    'Product'.
                                                    Default value is:
                                                    micro-machines.

options.description: The name of the Team you expect to be in opsLevel.yaml for the Owner field. Defaults to 'Product'.
